zh.lifeSummary: 當Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg於1030年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙時，他的父親Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau26歲，母親Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt24歲。他和Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1078年8月7日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 賀-格拉費爾德梅爾爾利可斯塔特享年48歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg于1030年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙时，他的父亲Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau26岁，母亲Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt24岁。他和Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1078年8月7日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 賀-格拉費爾德梅爾爾利可斯塔特享年48岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙。

nameMeanings.name: Markgraf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Wolf.

German and Dutch: status name from Middle High German marcgrāve ‘margrave’ (which is a title derived from marc ‘boundary’ + grāve ‘royal judge’). In some cases the title may have been applied as a nickname for someone with overbearing behavior or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a margrave.

variants.name: Margraf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Mathias.
German and Dutch (of German origin): variant of   Markgraf  .

variants.name: Margrave
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Wolf.

German and Dutch: status name from Middle High German marcgrāve ‘margrave’ (which is a title derived from marc ‘boundary’ + grāve ‘royal judge’). In some cases the title may have been applied as a nickname for someone with overbearing behavior or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a margrave.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Vohburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Vosberg  .

variants.name: Vosberg
meanings: North German: topographic name from vos(sen)berg ‘fox-hole’. Compare Vosburg , Vosburgh , and Vossberg .

nameMeanings.name: Diepold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Pierre, Marcel, Olivier.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements theud ‘people, race’ + bald, bold ‘bold, brave’ (see Theobald ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Debolt .

variants.name: Debold
meanings: German: variant of   Diebold  .

variants.name: Debolt
meanings: Altered form of German   Diebold   or   Debold  .

variants.name: Debutts
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of Dutch Debets or Dibbets, genitivized patronyms from the ancient Germanic personal name Dietbold, see Diebold .

variants.name: Diebolt
meanings: Alsatian: variant of German   Diebold  . Compare   Debolt  .

variants.name: Diebel
meanings: German: from a pet form of   Diebold   or an altered form of   Deibel  .

variants.name: Theobald
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg was born in 1030, in Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, was 26 and his mother, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen. He died on 7 August 1078, in Mellrichstadt, Rhön-Grabfeld, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 48, and was buried in Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg est né en 1030, à Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen. Il est décédé le 7 août 1078, à Mellrichstadt, Landkreis Rhön-Grabfeld, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg 1030 in Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau 26 und seine Mutter Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt 24. Er hatte mit Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. August 1078 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Mellrichstadt, Landkreis Rhön-Grabfeld, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg è nato il nel 1030 nel Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen. Morì il 7 agosto 1078, nel Mellrichstadt, Landkreis Rhön-Grabfeld, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania.

Graf im Augstgauは26歳，母Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurtは24歳であった。彼はLuitgard Gräfin von Zähringenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1078年8月7日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ルhoン-グラブフエルドメルリチスタトで48歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムボhブルグ アン ダー ドナウにて埋葬された。

ko.Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenhofen, Bava: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 보h버그 앤 데르 도나
ko.lifeSummary: Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg(이)가 1030년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 보h버그 앤 데르 도나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1078년 8월 7일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 ho-그라브펠드 멜리크스타드트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 보h버그 앤 데르 도나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg nasceu em 1030, em Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1078, em Mellrichstadt, Landkreis Rhön-Grabfeld, Bayern, Alemanha, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg родился в 1030 г. в местности фохбург ан дир донау, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen. Он умер 7 августа 1078 г. в местности меллричстадт, ландкрис рoн-грабфелд, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности фохбург ан дир донау, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diepold II. Markgraf von Vohburg nació en 1030, en Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Luitgard Gräfin von Zähringen. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1078, en Mellrichstadt, Landkreis Rhön-Grabfeld, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania.
